panels.title: Stack Targets Online
panels.description: Prometheus scrape health for Grafana, Loki, Tempo, Promtail, OTel Collector, and Prometheus itself.

panels.title: App Metrics Target
panels.description: Prometheus target state for stringman-headless on host.docker.internal:9464/metrics. Waiting means the app is stopped or the exporter is not reachable.

panels.title: App Heartbeat
panels.description: nf_robot_up from app instrumentation. Missing is shown separately from a real unhealthy zero.

panels.title: Robot Metric Families
panels.description: Current robot metric families present out of 81 instrumented families.

targets.expr: (label_replace(max(nf_robot_app_exporter_ready), "signal", "app exporter ready", "__name__", ".*") or on() label_replace(vector(0), "signal", "waiting for app exporter ready", "__name__", ".*")) or (label_replace(max(nf_robot_observability_debug_enabled), "signal", "observability debug enabled", "__name__", ".*") or on() label_replace(vector(0), "signal", "waiting for observability debug enabled", "__name__", ".*")) or (label_replace(max by (item_type) (nf_robot_telemetry_payload_expected), "signal", "telemetry payload expected", "__name__", ".*") or on() label_replace(label_replace(vector(0), "signal", "waiting for telemetry payload expected", "__name__", ".*"), "item_type", "waiting", "__name__", ".*")) or (label_replace(max by (item_type) (nf_robot_telemetry_payload_seen), "signal", "telemetry payload seen", "__name__", ".*") or on() label_replace(label_replace(vector(0), "signal", "waiting for telemetry payload seen", "__name__", ".*"), "item_type", "waiting", "__name__", ".*")) or (label_replace(max by (feed, component, transport, kind, scope) (nf_robot_video_feed_ready), "signal", "video feed ready", "__name__", ".*") or on() label_replace(label_replace(label_replace(label_replace(label_replace(label_replace(vector(0), "signal", "waiting for video feed ready", "__name__", ".*"), "feed", "waiting", "__name__", ".*"), "component", "unknown", "__name__", ".*"), "transport", "unknown", "__name__", ".*"), "kind", "unknown", "__name__", ".*"), "scope", "unknown", "__name__", ".*")) or (label_replace(time() - max by (feed, component) (nf_robot_video_feed_ready_last_seen_timestamp_seconds), "signal", "video feed ready age seconds", "__name__", ".*") or on() label_replace(label_replace(label_replace(vector(0), "signal", "waiting for video feed ready age seconds", "__name__", ".*"), "feed", "waiting", "__name__", ".*"), "component", "unknown", "__name__", ".*")) or (label_replace(time() - max by (feed, component, kind, scope) (nf_robot_video_feed_last_seen_timestamp_seconds), "signal", "video feed last-seen age seconds", "__name__", ".*") or on() label_replace(label_replace(label_replace(label_replace(label_replace(vector(0), "signal", "waiting for video feed last-seen age seconds", "__name__", ".*"), "feed", "waiting", "__name__", ".*"), "component", "unknown", "__name__", ".*"), "kind", "unknown", "__name__", ".*"), "scope", "unknown", "__name__", ".*")) or (label_replace(max by (factor, axis) (nf_robot_position_factor_value), "signal", "position factor value", "__name__", ".*") or on() label_replace(label_replace(label_replace(vector(0), "signal", "waiting for position factor value", "__name__", ".*"), "factor", "waiting", "__name__", ".*"), "axis", "unknown", "__name__", ".*")) or (label_replace(max(nf_robot_gantry_sightings), "signal", "gantry sightings", "__name__", ".*") or on() label_replace(vector(0), "signal", "waiting for gantry sightings", "__name__", ".*")) or (label_replace(max(nf_robot_anchor_poses), "signal", "anchor poses", "__name__", ".*") or on() label_replace(vector(0), "signal", "waiting for anchor poses", "__name__", ".*")) or (label_replace(max by (name) (nf_robot_named_position_visible), "signal", "named position visible", "__name__", ".*") or on() label_replace(label_replace(vector(0), "signal", "waiting for named position visible", "__name__", ".*"), "name", "waiting", "__name__", ".*")) or (label_replace(max by (name, axis) (nf_robot_named_position_meters), "signal", "named position meters", "__name__", ".*") or on() label_replace(label_replace(label_replace(vector(0), "signal", "waiting for named position meters", "__name__", ".*"), "name", "waiting", "__name__", ".*"), "axis", "unknown", "__name__", ".*")) or (label_replace(label_replace(max by (signal) (nf_robot_grip_cam_prediction), "prediction", "$1", "signal", "(.*)"), "signal", "grip camera prediction", "__name__", ".*") or on() label_replace(label_replace(label_replace(vector(0), "signal", "waiting for grip camera prediction", "__name__", ".*"), "prediction", "waiting", "__name__", ".*"), "source", "fallback", "__name__", ".*")) or (label_replace(max(nf_robot_uplink_online), "signal", "uplink online", "__name__", ".*") or on() label_replace(vector(0), "signal", "waiting for uplink online", "__name__", ".*")) or (label_replace(time() - max(nf_robot_uplink_last_seen_timestamp_seconds), "signal", "uplink last-seen age seconds", "__name__", ".*") or on() label_replace(vector(0), "signal", "waiting for uplink last-seen age seconds", "__name__", ".*")) or (label_replace(max(nf_robot_lerobot_episode_status), "signal", "lerobot episode status", "__name__", ".*") or on() label_replace(vector(0), "signal", "waiting for lerobot episode status", "__name__", ".*")) or (label_replace(max(nf_robot_calibration_origin_visible_anchors), "signal", "calibration origin visible anchors", "__name__", ".*") or on() label_replace(vector(0), "signal", "waiting for calibration origin visible anchors", "__name__", ".*")) or (label_replace(max by (anchor) (nf_robot_calibration_anchor_sees_origin), "signal", "calibration anchor sees origin", "__name__", ".*") or on() label_replace(label_replace(vector(0), "signal", "waiting for calibration anchor sees origin", "__name__", ".*"), "anchor", "waiting", "__name__", ".*"))

panels.title: Scrape Target State Timeline
panels.description: State timeline for stack targets and the app metrics target. The app target may wait while stringman-headless is stopped; stack targets should stay up.

targets.expr: max by (job) (up{job=~"prometheus|grafana|loki|tempo|promtail|otel-collector|stringman-headless"}) or on() label_replace(vector(0), "job", "waiting for scrape targets", "__name__", ".*")

panels.title: Warnings and Errors
panels.description: Recent warning and error JSON logs from stringman-headless. Use this with the debug status table when metrics are waiting.

panels.title: Recent App Logs
panels.description: Recent JSONL app logs from Loki, including DEBUG telemetry payload summaries when --observability-debug or NF_OBSERVABILITY_DEBUG=1 is enabled.
